task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Aerobridge admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Aerobridge Django admin dashboard at http://localhost:8000/admin/, indicating successful login as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Agent created a Flight Plan named 'Kolkata Port Survey' with a valid GeoJSON Polygon for the Kolkata port area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Flight Plan creation or detail page showing the name 'Kolkata Port Survey' and a GeoJSON Polygon in the geometry field with coordinates around 22.56-22.57 latitude and 88.36 longitude.

task_completion.description: The Flight Plan contains a non-empty Plan File JSON.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Plan File JSON' field in the Flight Plan form contains valid, non-empty JSON data.

task_completion.description: Agent created a Flight Operation named 'Kolkata Port Inspection' associated with the correct flight plan, drone, pilot, and operator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Flight Operation form or detail view showing the name 'Kolkata Port Inspection', the newly created flight plan selected, aircraft 'F1 #2', pilot 'Niteesh Taral Pavani', and operator 'Electric Inspection'.

task_completion.description: The Flight Operation has the correct purpose, operation type, and scheduled duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flight Operation form shows purpose set to 'photographing', operation type set to 'VLOS', start time '2026-03-01 09:00:00', and end time '2026-03-01 11:00:00'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with the Aerobridge admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Django admin pages, rather than terminal commands executing scripts or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely filled out the forms for Flight Plan and Flight Operation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or pasting values into the form fields (like GeoJSON, JSON, dates) and clicking save, rather than just showing a final success message without intermediate steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Pilot 'Niteesh Pavani' is listed in the system as 'Niteesh Taral Pavani'. Kolkata port coordinates are approximately 22.5626°N, 88.3630°E. The admin URL is http://localhost:8000/admin/.
